verse_text: 'Behold, I send My Angel before your face, to keep you in the way and to bring you into the land I prepared for you.

links.context: This verse describes the important role of the guardian angel, who watches and guides us through the day. For other examples, see [[EXO.23:20]]-23; 32:34; [[PSA.90:11]].

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
